caption: The video shows a static educational presentation slide titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" at the top and "Linde – Hampson System" as the main header. The slide contains mathematical derivations involving variables for enthalpy, including the equation "y = (h_1 - h_2) / (h_1 - h_f)" and "h_{1'} = \epsilon(h_1 - h_g) + h_g". Below these, a final derivation for "y" is shown as a complex fraction: "y = ((h_1 - h_2) - (1 - \epsilon)(h_1 - h_g)) / ((h_1 - h_f) - (1 - \epsilon)(h_1 - h_g))". A red rectangular highlight is placed over "h_1" in the first equation and "h_{1'}" in the second equation to emphasize the substitution process. The bottom of the slide features the "NPTEL" logo and text attributing the content to "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". Throughout the frames, the image remains identical, with no movement or changes in the text or highlights.
